message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #888888
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #888888
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  ActorBorderColor #888888
  ArrowColor #222222
  ActivationBorderColor #222222
  ActivationBackgroundColor #0B66FF
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFF7C7
  NoteBorderColor #888888
}

participant "generate_delta_main.cc" as G
participant "delta_diff_generator.cc" as D
participant "payload_file.cc" as P
participant "payload_generation_config.cc" as C

G -> G : brillo::KeyValueStore.Load(file)
G <-- G

G -> C : payload_config.target.LoadDynamicPartitionMetadata(store)
activate C
C --> G
deactivate C

G -> C : payload_config.target.ValidateDynamicPartitionMetadata()
activate C
C --> G
deactivate C

G -> D : GenerateUpdatePayloadFile()
activate D

D -> P : payload.Init(config)
activate P
P -> P : manifest_.dynamic_partition_metadata
P <-- P
P --> D
deactivate P

D --> D : generate payload data

D -> P : payload.WritePayload()
activate P
P -> P : manifest_.SerializeToString()
P <-- P
P -> P : Write(serialized_manifest.data())
P <-- P
P --> D
deactivate P

D --> G
deactivate D

G --> G : done
@enduml
